rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that IsUnipotent inherits an unnecessary [Field k] constraint when GroupLike and IsNilpotent require only CommSemiring/Ring — a clear, grounded generality fix. Review 1's generality finding (drop AffineAlgGroup to CommRing) is likely incorrect because Algebra.IsGeometricallyReduced is a field-level notion in Mathlib, so acting on it risks a compilation failure.
